title: ArKnight Rosmontis Cats
description: Turns cats into a neko anime girl from ArKnight, which is pretty cute...
body:
# This is ArKnight ロスモンティス or nammed ''Rosmontis'' resourcepack
- Rosmontis, Rhodes Island Elite Operator, pushes open your office door by hand. But now in Minecraft....
- Her equipment's not on her. No need to worry about her remembering you ate her snacks yesterday. Probably.
________________________________________________________________________________________
Named a cat to Rosmontis!
________________________________________________________________________________________
# Features:
- 20+ Japanese voicelines
- Emote animated
- Model animated
- 2 variations
_________________________________________________________________________________________
# Note
- This pack contain many voicelines that annoying when you spamming to much cat!
- Optifine is required!
_________________________________________________________________________________________
# Enjoy!
